title: filipendula × purpurea f. albiflora
intro: Filipendula × purpurea f. albiflora is a rare, white flowering form of the hybrid Filipendula rubra var. purpurea plant, commonly known as purple meadow-sweet. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. Filipendula × purpurea f. albiflora has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, as well as being used in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
